items.title: Getting Started with Angular
items.content: Angular is a platform and framework for building single-page client applications using HTML and TypeScript. In this article, we'll explore the basics of Angular and how to get started with your first project.

items.title: Understanding TypeScript
items.content: TypeScript is a strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript. Learn how TypeScript can improve your development workflow and catch errors early in development.

items.title: Responsive Design Principles
items.content: Creating responsive web applications is crucial in today's multi-device world. Discover the key principles and best practices for building responsive user interfaces.
